crisisFooter.amplify: Tonight more than most nights, you are not alone.

pillar.claritySub: Seeing the storm for what it was. Naming what happened.
pillar.calmSub: The nervous system as a place to come home to.
pillar.strengthSub: Rebuilding identity, boundaries, the forward motion.

hero.sub: Now rebuild what remains — with clarity, calm, strength, and purpose.

breath.label: Before You Scroll Further
breath.title: Take sixty seconds.
breath.prompt: One breath is enough to begin. The rest will follow.
breath.complete: Sixty seconds. Well done. The harbor is patient.

login.title: Welcome back.
login.subtitle: The harbor is steady. Sign in to continue.

errors.invalid: That email and password don't match.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.needsConfirm: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.tooMany: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.

doors.resourcesSub: What the team has read first

reflection.title: How are you arriving today?
reflection.subtitle: One sentence is enough. Or skip — the harbor waits.

journal.greeting: Write what you cannot carry alone.
journal.lastNever: Your first entry is the heaviest. Then they get lighter.
journal.lastToday: You wrote today. Stay a little longer.
journal.lastYesterday: You wrote yesterday. The harbor is open.
journal.lastDays: Your last entry was {count} days ago.
journal.promptHelp: Use it if it lands. Ignore it if it doesn't.
journal.title: One honest sentence is enough.
journal.privacy: Your journal is private. Encrypted. Yours alone. No one — not even Stone Harbor staff — can read what you write here.
journal.bodyCheckOffer: Before you write — one breath in your body?
journal.reflectionPlaceholder: What do you need to say today?
journal.startNudge: Start with one word. Any word.
journal.wordsZero: Start anywhere. Even half a sentence counts.
journal.privateLine: No one reads this but you.
journal.reflectionMoodLabel: How does this memory sit with you?
journal.emptyTitle: Your first entry is the heaviest.
journal.emptySub: Then they get lighter. Start with one honest sentence — no one is reading.
journal.editHelp: Your first words (title and body) are preserved. This refines only the rendered version.
journal.patternSub: Each square is a day. The color is the mood you named. The blanks are days you didn't write. No judgment — just data, looking back at you.

alerts.editEmpty: Entry body can't be empty. Cancel instead to leave as-is.
alerts.editWindowClosed: The edit window for this entry has closed. The original is preserved.
alerts.editFailed: Couldn't save the edit. Try again in a moment.

strip.smallAct: Each one is a small act of courage.
strip.privacyHeadline: Stone Harbor staff cannot read your messages.
strip.privacySub: Encrypted. Yours alone. Member-to-member, by design.

inbox.title: Reach out.
inbox.subtitle: A conversation is a small act of courage. Find another member to begin.
inbox.noConversationsSub: Reach out to one man this week. That's enough.

empty.headline: A conversation is a small act of courage.
empty.sub: When you're ready, choose a member from the left or search for one above.

membersBlog.title: Read.
membersBlog.emptySub: Try the other source, or come back soon.

resources.title: Reading the team has read first.
resources.subtitle: Articles, essays, and talks the team has vetted before they appear here. Grouped by the pillar each one tends to speak to. Tap any card to open the source in a new tab.
resources.emptyMessage: The resource library is being prepared. Once the team has approved the next round of curated reading, it appears here. Check back in a few days.

roadmap.title: Your path.
roadmap.subtitle: Three stages. Five steps each. Move at your pace. Mark what you've done.

stageBlurb.clarity: Name the storm. Trust your perception again.
stageBlurb.calm: Steady your nervous system. Reclaim your peace.

roadmap.emptyStage: No steps in this stage yet.
roadmap.pathCompleteSub: Sit with that for a moment. The work was yours.

toast.markFailed: Couldn't mark that step as complete. Try again.
toast.undoFailed: Couldn't undo that step. Try again.

welcome.pageSubtitle: Update your personal information, privacy, and location.

placeholders.perspective: Rebuilding with clarity, strength, and purpose...
placeholders.favoriteQuote: Rebuilding isn't about returning to who I was—it's about becoming who I was meant to be.

welcome.interfaceLanguageHelp: Switching reloads the page. Your preference is saved.
welcome.knownLanguagesHelp: Pick all you can hold a conversation in. We use this for matching and tone, not display.

dates.title: If you want us to mark a day with you.
dates.body: Stone Harbor quietly notices your birthday and a few of the hardest days of the year — Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year's Eve, Father's Day. We will not celebrate. We will simply notice. Both can be turned off.
dates.yearHelp: The year is optional. We don't need your age — we just remember the day.
dates.ackBirthday: Acknowledge my birthday quietly when it arrives.
dates.ackBirthdayHelp: A single tile on the dashboard. No popup. No email.
dates.ackSeasonal: Acknowledge the hard holidays with me.
dates.ackSeasonalHelp: Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year's Eve, Father's Day. One quiet tile only on those days.

leaving.title: Close your account.
leaving.body1: You can close your account at any time. We will delete your private journal entries within 30 days and your other personal data within 90 days, as described in our
leaving.body2: . If you ever want to come back, you are welcome — but a new account will start fresh.
leaving.confirmBody: Once submitted, your account is queued for deletion. You will be signed out immediately. You can leave a brief note below if you want to tell us why — it helps us improve, and we read every one.
leaving.reasonPlaceholder: Anything you'd like us to know? (optional)

errors.locationUnsupported: Location services are not supported by this browser.
errors.locationNoCity: Could not determine your city from your coordinates.
errors.locationReverseFailed: Could not convert your coordinates into a city/state.
errors.locationDenied: Location permission was denied. Please allow location access in your browser.
errors.locationTimeout: Location request timed out. Please try again.

meditation.stay: Stay as long as you want.

guidance.longExhale: Four in. Seven out. For when something is sitting heavy.
guidance.withSound: Breathe with the rhythm. Leave whenever you're ready.
guidance.silence: Tap the speaker to add ambient sound. Or breathe in silence.

vent.title: Put it down here.
vent.subtitle: Nothing you write here goes anywhere. It's saved to your private journal and only you can read it.
vent.placeholder: Whatever it is. No formatting, no audience.
